examples: They thought that he should resume his kingly duties.
Down on your marrow bones, all of ye, and do reverence to his kingly port and royal rags!
Tom experienced a glow of pride and a renewed sense of the compensating advantages of the kingly office.
He is kingly in the way Sansa Stark imagines kings ought to be.
In addition, Delmonte pays Validare a kingly 15% on the fees he generates in excess of what he would have earned performing surgery in a hospital.
